# Test Skill

This is a test skill for validating ai-config sync functionality.

## Purpose

This skill exists solely to verify that:
1. Skills are properly synced to plugin directories
2. The directory structure is preserved
3. Content is copied correctly

## Verification

If you can read this, the sync worked correctly.
